title: Cookielicious
description: Cookielicious is an addon to the Abnormals mod "Neapolitan" that adds new cookies to each flavor and blocks!
body:
### Welcome to Cookielicious!

Cookielicious is an add-on mod to team Abnormal's "Neapolitan" mod, we strive to add more cookies for each flavor that the mod introduces and fun cookie tile blocks for all your cookie-building needs!

![cookiejar cookielicious](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/848dfdc7211edfdfdf3b78927c75405e624709f2.png)
- Feature list:
1.  New cookies (vanilla, strawberry, chocolate, banana, mint, adzuki)
1.  Cookie tile blocks for each one
1.  Mod compatibility for other cookies! (farmers delight, abnormal's delight)

join our 
[discord!](https://discord.gg/X76CFdvdag)

use in mod packs is allowed and encouraged! (as long as its on an official website)

![nodecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4c892e71540705189ae106cae8de6888dff1e67.png)
